title: push: PushSubscription/set with chatPush property
description:
Implement PushSubscription/set with chatPush extension in methods/misc.rs:
- ChatPushFilter: per-chat urgency overrides, mention-only mode, excluded chatIds
- PushSubscription create/update: include chatPush field when capability is present
- Urgency: 'high' for mentions, 'normal' for regular messages
- Fixture test: PushSubscription/set request with chatPush, assert correct wire shape

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/push_subscription_set.json
close_reason: superseded by 9gp.2 (push_subscription_set implemented as part of 9gp epic)
